attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   GLOBAL_NAME,
   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
   DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
   DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   (
   SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   COALESCE(CAST((
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
     THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
              THEN 1.000000
              ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
            END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     ELSE  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
   END)
   * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
   ),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   0     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
   
   CAST(
   COALESCE((
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' 
         THEN CAST( CAST(( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
                 WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
                  * 
                  CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
                    THEN 1 
                    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
                  END 
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
             * 
             CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
           * 
           COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
         ELSE 0.0000000
       END
   END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,/* OAQ1FY15*/
   
   COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
         THEN /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation 
           CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
           */
           CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit'
             OR
             (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE='RETURN'))
             THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY /* OAQ1FY15*/
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
       END) 
   END 
   *  
   ( CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000) * WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT ELSE WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT END)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   
   /* :pvenketa DEFAULTING ICMS-ADJ TO ZERO AS PART OF Q1FY15 by SC-LSS*/
   COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
   CASE WHEN (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE '%ICMS-ADJ%'  OR NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
   CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
     (CAST( WDNRTSC.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT 
     * 
     WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7))* 
     COALESCE(CAST(NCR.COGS_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 0.0000000
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 0.0000000
   ELSE 0.0000000
   END
   end 
   END AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
   /*END OF CHANGES FOR ICMS-ADJ*/
   CASE WHEN  ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
   )
   AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' 
   AND  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
     THEN 0 
     ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  
   END   DV_EXTENDED_QTY , 
   /* OA Q1FY15 */
   CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN EL.ATTRIBUTE8 END AS ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT,
   CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (
   CAST( ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)* CAST(COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))/*knarlapu:/(CASE WHEN (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 THEN 1.0000000
   WHEN  DV_EXTENDED_QTY < 0 THEN DV_EXTENDED_QTY * -1  ELSE DV_EXTENDED_QTY END)*/ AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
   ELSE CAST(COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END as UNIT_PRICE,
   CAST(COALESCE(
   CAST(
   CAST(
   (CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 
   CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
   /* rivijay : commented to use top SKU qty 
   THEN WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY */
   THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
   ELSE 0.0000000
   END
   /* rivijay : commented to use top SKU qty 
   ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY */
   ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
   END) *
   (CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' THEN 0.0000000 
   ELSE CAST(UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
   END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
   *
   ( CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000 
   ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
   END )
   AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   /* OA Q1FY15 */
   0     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
    /*:pvenketa CHANGE FOR Q1FY15 as part of SC-LSS*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   /*END OF CHANGES Q1FY15as part of SC-LSS*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
    ON(NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
    /* OA Q1FY15 */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL 
   ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL
   ON NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME=EL.GLOBAL_NAME
   /* OA Q1FY15 */
   /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
    ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
    AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
   /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN
    ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
    
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN_CAL
    ON (SMSOLN_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
    AND SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN_CAL
    ON ( SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
   /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */    
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
        ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
        AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
   /*  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_CMDM_ADJ_REQUEST NACAR 
        ON ( NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT = NATL.BK_SAF_ID_INT 
          AND NACAR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
          AND NACAR.BK_COMPANY_CD = NATL.BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE  ) 
   */    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
   ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
    ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
    ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
    ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
    ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
    AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL  
    ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
    ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)    
   
   /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
    
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO  WDNRTEQ
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_BASE_PRC_RAO WDNRTBP
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTBP.GLOBAL_NAME )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_STD_CST_RAO WDNRTSC
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTSC.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTSC.GLOBAL_NAME )

/* START : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Oct 2022 Rel */ 
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD,RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE where ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('CBM-OPL-ICMS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') group by 1,2,3)NATL_CBM 
  ON NATL_CBM.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_OPL
  ON (NATL_CBM.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY = NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL')

   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
         WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
         AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND (SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)  
   AND (SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL )
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
   AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG<>'Y' OR (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0)) /*ADDED THIS FILTER FOR RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   COALESCE(CAST(
   (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 
    CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
       THEN 1.000000
       ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8))
          END) 
    AS DECIMAL(26,7))
    ELSE NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
   END)* COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   0 REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
   
   CAST(COALESCE((
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
    CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
     CAST
     ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
       WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
        ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) 
        END 
       ELSE 0.0000000
      END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
     CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
     COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
    ELSE 0.0000000
    END
   END),0.0000000) 
   AS DECIMAL(26,7))   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   
   COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
         THEN CASE  /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation  
             WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit'
             */          
             WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit' 
               OR 
              (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
             THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY /*OAQ1FY15 */
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         ELSE  WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
        END) 
   END 
   * ( CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN (ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000) * WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT ELSE WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT END)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
   
   /* :pvenketa DEFAULTING ICMS-ADJ TO ZERO AS PART OF Q1FY15 by SC-LSS*/
   /*ARAJANAL: DEFAULTED FOR ALL ICMS TRANSACTIONS AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
   COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
   CASE WHEN (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE '%ICMS%'  OR NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
   CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
     (CAST( WDNRTSC.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT 
     * 
     WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7))* 
     COALESCE(CAST(NCR.COGS_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 0.0000000
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 0.0000000
   ELSE 0.0000000
   END
   end 
   END AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
   /*END OF CHANGES FOR ICMS-ADJ*/
   
   CASE WHEN  ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
   )
   AND  /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'  AND  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
    THEN 0 
    ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  
   END    DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
   '0' ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT,
   0 UNIT_PRICE,
   0 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   0 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
    /*:pvenketa CHANGE FOR Q1FY15 as part of SC-LSS*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   /*END OF CHANGES Q1FY15as part of SC-LSS*/
   
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
    ON(NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
    /* OA Q1FY15 */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL 
   ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
   
   /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
    ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
    AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN
    ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
   ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
   /*
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_CMDM_ADJ_REQUEST NACAR 
       ON ( NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT = NATL.BK_SAF_ID_INT 
        AND NACAR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
        AND NACAR.BK_COMPANY_CD = NATL.BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE  ) 
   */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
   ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
    ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
    ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
    ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
   /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
    ON (NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOL.SS_CODE) 
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
    ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
    AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL   
    ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
    ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
   /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO WDNRTEQ
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_BASE_PRC_RAO WDNRTBP
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTBP.GLOBAL_NAME )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_STD_CST_RAO WDNRTSC
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTSC.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
     WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
     AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N'  /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
  AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG<>'Y' OR (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0)) /*ADDED THIS FILTER FOR RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
   )DRVD

SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN 'Provision Adjustment' 
  WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ='DA'  THEN 'Deferral-Release' ELSE 'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  -7777 as SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NSO_TSV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,  
  NSOL_TSV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  SAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
  NSOL_TSV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN -9984
   WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'DA' THEN -9982
   ELSE -9980
  END DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')
   THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE NCR.TRX_TYPE
   END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
   -7777  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' AS  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    NULL AS SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
    'UNKNOWN' AS DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
    -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
    NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT, 
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
  SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
   
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
     on SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
     ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
     AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
     AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
   
    INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_TSV
  ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_TSV.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_TSV
  ON NSOL_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY  

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
    ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
   AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
   
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/  
  AND NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0
    
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN 'Provision Adjustment'
  WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ='DA'  THEN 'Deferral-Release' ELSE 'As Invoiced' END  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  -7777 as SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NSO_TSV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,  
  NSOL_TSV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

  
  -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  SAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
  NSOL_TSV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN -9984
   WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'DA' THEN -9982
   ELSE -9980  
  END DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) as SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')
   THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE NCR.TRX_TYPE
   END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
    -7777  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' AS  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    NULL AS SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
    'UNKNOWN' AS DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
    -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
    NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT, 
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
  SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
     on SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
     ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
     AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
     AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  
    INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_TSV
  ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_TSV.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_TSV
  ON NSOL_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
    ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
   AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
  
  
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/  
  AND NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0

SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 /*
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,NSOT_CAL.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) = '=' OR COALESCE(NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,NSOT_CAL.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) IS NULL THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE COALESCE(NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG ,NSOT_CAL.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG )
 END DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 */
 /*
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(ORD_LN_V.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG,ORD_LN_V_CAL.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG) = 'Y' THEN
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT_Y.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG ,NSOT_CAL_Y.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) = '=' 
   OR COALESCE(NSOT_Y.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,NSOT_CAL_Y.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) IS NULL THEN 'Y' 
  ELSE COALESCE(NSOT_Y.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,NSOT_CAL_Y.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) 
  END 
 ELSE
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG ,NSOT_CAL.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) = '=' 
   OR COALESCE(NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,NSOT_CAL.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) IS NULL THEN 'Y' 
  ELSE COALESCE(NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,NSOT_CAL.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG) 
  END 
 END DV_REVENUE_FLG, */
  /* 'Y' AS DV_REVENUE_FLG,  */
 
 CASE WHEN (NSOLN.SS_CODE = 'CG' AND NSORDTV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y') OR (NSORDTV.SS_CODE <> 'CG')   THEN  CASE WHEN NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END 
   ELSE CASE WHEN NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END END
 as DV_REVENUE_FLG,  /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15: If Order got created in old 11i system then flag will be derived based on order table otherwise if order gets created in new CG system, then flag will be derived from order line table*/
 
 CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
  CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
  ELSE 'N' 
  END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation 
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,8)='Standard' AND
             NSORDTV.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE  IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int"""" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y' 
             ELSE 'N' 
             END DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 */   
 '='  DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG , 
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
 /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation 
 CASE 
             WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,1,12)='Replacements' AND 
                         NSORDTV.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int"""" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y'
             ELSE 'N' 
             END DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 */   
 '='  DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,  
 CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' 
 END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOLN.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,NSOLN_CAL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,NSOL_OPL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE) = 'MAJOR' THEN 'Y' 
  WHEN COALESCE(NSOLN.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,NSOLN_CAL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,NSOL_OPL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE) = 'MINOR' THEN 'N'
 END MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 /*CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR EST.TERRITORY_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR EST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,*/
 CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE   <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,
 '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  
 
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
  
  
 /* INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
  ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
 /* INNER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
  ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  --AND NSOLN.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
  )
  
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN_CAL
  ON (SMSOLN_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN_CAL
  ON ( SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 --AND NSOLN_CAL.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 )
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */  
  
  
  /* Commeneted as part of sales credit implementation*/
 /*INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
  ON(NCR.TERRITORY_ID = EST.TERRITORY_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EST.GLOBAL_NAME)
 */ 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
   ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) */ /*COMMENTING THIS JOIN AS PART OF TSV*/
 
 /*ADDED BELOW 2 JOINS AS PART OF NGCCRM TSV FOR BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY DERIVATION*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_KEY1_RAO WKEY1
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WKEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WKEY1.GLOBAL_NAME )
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
   ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WKEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) 
   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
   ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
   
   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
  ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
         AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSORDTV
  ON(SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   AND NSORDTV.END_TV_DATETIME =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV ORD_LN_V
  ON(NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ORD_LN_V.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND ORD_LN_V.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSOTT_NEW     /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15 */
  ON ORD_LN_V.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_NEW.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 AND NSOTT_NEW.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT_OLD     /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15 */
 ON NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_OLD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 AND NSOTT_OLD.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 
  
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */     
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_Y
  ON(NSOT_Y.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
 */LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL
  ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
         AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSORDTV_CAL
  ON(SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)*/
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV ORD_LN_V_CAL
  ON(NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ORD_LN_V_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND ORD_LN_V_CAL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
 *//*LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL
  ON(NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = ORD_LN_V_CAL.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME)*/
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL_Y
  ON(NSOT_CAL_Y.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
 *//* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON(NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )

/* START : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM OCT 2022 Rel */  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD,RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE where ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('CBM-OPL-ICMS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') group by 1,2,3)NATL_CBM 
  ON NATL_CBM.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_OPL
  ON (NATL_CBM.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY = NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
  /* END : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Oct 2022 Rel */ 

 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
       WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
 AND ( SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL )
 AND ( NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)  
 AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 /*CASE WHEN NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG 
 END DV_REVENUE_FLG,*/
 --'Y' AS DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 
 CASE WHEN (NSOLN.SS_CODE = 'CG' AND NSORDTV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y') OR (NSORDTV.SS_CODE <> 'CG')   THEN  CASE WHEN NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END 
   ELSE CASE WHEN NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END END
 as DV_REVENUE_FLG,  /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15: If Order got created in old 11i system then flag will be derived based on order table otherwise if order gets created in new CG system, then flag will be derived from order line table*/
 
 
 CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
  CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
  ELSE 'N' 
  END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation 
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,8)='Standard' AND
             NSORDTV.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE  IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int"""" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y' 
             ELSE 'N' 
             END DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 */   
 '='  DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG , 
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
 /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation 
 CASE 
             WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,1,12)='Replacements' AND 
                         NSORDTV.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int"""" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y'
             ELSE 'N' 
             END DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 */   
 '='  DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,  
 CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N' 
 END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 'Y' MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 /*CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR EST.TERRITORY_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR EST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,*/
 CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE   <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,
 '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 /*INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
  ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
 INNER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
  ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)*/
 /* Commeneted as part of sales credit implementation*/
 /*INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
  ON(NCR.TERRITORY_ID = EST.TERRITORY_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EST.GLOBAL_NAME)
 */ 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
  ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
 /* INNER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
  ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  --AND NSOLN.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
  )
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
 /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
   ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) */ /*COMMENTED THE EXISTING DERIVATION*/
  /*ADDED BELOW 2 JOINS AS PART OF NGCCRM TSV FOR BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY DERIVATION*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_KEY1_RAO WKEY1
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WKEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WKEY1.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
   ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WKEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) 
   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
   ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
  ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
         AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSORDTV
  ON(SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND NSORDTV.END_TV_DATETIME =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV ORD_LN_V
  ON(NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ORD_LN_V.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND ORD_LN_V.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSOTT_NEW 
  ON ORD_LN_V.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_NEW.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 AND NSOTT_NEW.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT_OLD
 ON NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_OLD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 AND NSOTT_OLD.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
  
 /* rchettri : 10/25/2013 : commenting as not required.
 LEFT OUTER JOIN ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
  ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
         AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)    
 LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV
  ON(SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON(NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )
 WHERE  EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
   WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/

SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   CASE WHEN COALESCE((( 
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'Trade-In Return' 
AND UPPER(COALESCE(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'MIXED'            
THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) 
END)),0) <> 0      THEN 
CASE 
WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV')       THEN COALESCE(CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE)               
 THEN 0.0000000
               ELSE CAST(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
             END,0.0000000) 
         ELSE 0.0000000
       END
     ELSE 0.0000000
   END AS DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT 
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
   ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID
   AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON( EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NATL.SS_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL /*TO TAKE TOPSKU PRODUCT INFORMATION*/
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON NP.ITEM_KEY=NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY                
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT
    ON(NPPT.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
    AND CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT.END_TV_DATE
    AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
	and NPPT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
	)
   INNER JOIN (
      SELECT 
        NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
        NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
        NP1.ITEM_KEY ITEM_KEY,
        MAX(NPPT1.START_TV_DATE) MAX_START_DATE
        FROM
        $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR1
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME)
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT1 
      ON( SAT1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR1.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
      AND SAT1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
      ON( NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT1.AR_TRX_KEY)  
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
      ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = NCR1.ADJUSTMENT_ID
      AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME 
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON( EOXRNR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
	  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NATL.SS_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL /*TO TAKE TOPSKU PRODUCT INFORMATION*/
   ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
       ON NP1.ITEM_KEY =NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT1
      ON(NPPT1.ITEM_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY
      AND NPPT1.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
      AND CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT1.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT1.END_TV_DATE
      and NPPT1.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'  
		)
      GROUP BY
        NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
        NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME,
        NP1.ITEM_KEY
  ) MAX_DATE
  ON(MAX_DATE.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
   AND MAX_DATE.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND MAX_DATE.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   AND MAX_DATE.MAX_START_DATE = NPPT.START_TV_DATE)
   /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
    ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
    AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
   /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
    ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
    ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
    ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
    ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN_CAL
    ON (SMSOLN_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
    AND SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN_CAL
    ON ( SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
    ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
    AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL   
    ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
    ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
   /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
     WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  (SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL 
OR SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)
   AND (NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL 
OR NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' AND NCR.MERAKI_FLAG='Y'

SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN 'Provision Adjustment' 
  WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ='DA'  THEN 'Deferral-Release' ELSE 'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
    -7777 as SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NSO_TSV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSOL_TSV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
  /*NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/
  NSOL_TSV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,  /*Q2OCT SOT CHANGE*/
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN -9984
   WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'DA' THEN -9982
   ELSE -9980
  END DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')
   THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE NCR.TRX_TYPE
   END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
    -7777  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' AS  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    NULL AS SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
    'UNKNOWN' AS DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
    -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
    NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT, 
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
  SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
    ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
   AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
     on SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
     ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
     AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
     AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_TSV
  ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_TSV.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_TSV
  ON NSOL_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
  
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y'
 AND NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN 'Provision Adjustment' 
  WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ='DA'  THEN 'Deferral-Release' ELSE 'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
    -7777 as SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NSO_TSV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSOL_TSV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
  /*NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/
  NSOL_TSV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,  /*Q2OCT SOT CHANGE*/
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN -9984
   WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'DA' THEN -9982
   ELSE -9980
  END DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')
   THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE NCR.TRX_TYPE
   END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
    -7777  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' AS  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    NULL AS SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
    'UNKNOWN' AS DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
    -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
    'UNKNOWN' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
    NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT, 
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
  SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
    ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
   AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
     on SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
     ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
     AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
     AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN (SELECT  CASE WHEN NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=(-999) THEN CAST(NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
        ELSE NSOLV.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM  END AS ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM,
        NSOL_INIT.BK_LINE_REF_NUM,NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
        INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_INIT
        ON NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL_INIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
        AND NSOLV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00') NSOL1
        ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_TSV
  ON NSOL1.ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL_TSV.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_TSV
  ON NSOL_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO_TSV.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
  
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y'
 AND NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0

SELECT
WI_FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,WI_FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
,WI_FLG_CD.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
FROM
(   
/*STEP: 1 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR MATERIAL TRANSACTIONS FOR 10008*/
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.UNIT_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT
Z.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,Z.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,Z.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_QTY = 1 THEN MTL_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_QTY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_AMT = 1 THEN CAL_COST ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_AMT
,COMP_MTL_AMT/COMP_MTL_QTY AS UNIT_USD_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
ABS(MTL.TRANSACTION_QTY) AS MTL_QTY
,ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_DR_USD_AMT,0)) + ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_CR_USD_AMT,0))  AS CAL_COST
,MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ORDER BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_AMT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ORDER BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_QTY
FROM
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL
ON TRX_DET.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
WHERE MTL.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition'
AND MTL.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
AND TRX_DET.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO FIX1 
   WHERE MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = FIX1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
   AND MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = FIX1.ITEM_KEY            
   AND MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = FIX1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND FIX1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_10008')
) Z
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY    = FLG_CD1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY                 =     FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     = FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_10008'
UNION ALL
/*STEP: 1 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR MATERIAL TRANSACTIONS FOR 33*/
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.UNIT_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT
Z.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,Z.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,Z.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_QTY = 1 THEN MTL_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_QTY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_AMT = 1 THEN CAL_COST ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_AMT
,COMP_MTL_AMT/COMP_MTL_QTY AS UNIT_USD_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
ABS(MTL.TRANSACTION_QTY) AS MTL_QTY
,ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_DR_USD_AMT,0)) + ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_CR_USD_AMT,0))  AS CAL_COST
,MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ORDER BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_AMT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ORDER BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_QTY
FROM
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL
ON TRX_DET.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
WHERE MTL.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue'
AND MTL.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
AND TRX_DET.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO FIX1 
   WHERE MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = FIX1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
   AND MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = FIX1.ITEM_KEY            
   AND MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = FIX1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND FIX1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_33')
) Z
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY    = FLG_CD1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY                 =     FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     = FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_33'
/*STEP: 2 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR AS BUILT*/
UNION ALL
/*SELECT 
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE  COALESCE(BOM.DF_FEE_USD_COST,0) + COALESCE(BOM.DV_ROLLUP_USD_COST,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_CG   FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM
ON FLG_CD1.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND BOM.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS'
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'AS_BUILT' */
/*COGs Q2FY13 Release Changes */
SELECT 
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE  COALESCE(BOM.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO   FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE = NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN BOM
ON CAST(TRIM(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS VARCHAR(50))=BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
AND FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'AS_BUILT'
/*STEP: 3 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR LOCAL ORG*/
UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO   FLG_CD1
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT 
CSC.ITEM_KEY
,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
,CSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) AS RNK
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST CSC
ON CSC.ITEM_KEY  = FLG_CD.ITEM_KEY 
AND CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = FLG_CD.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
AND CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= COALESCE(FLG_CD.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,FLG_CD.AR_TRX_DATETIME ) 
WHERE FLG_CD.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_LCL'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) X
ON FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = X.ITEM_KEY
AND FLG_CD1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE = X.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
/*AND X.RNK = 1*/
AND FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = X.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
AND FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME = X.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE  FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_LCL'
/* sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of Q1FY15 STEP: 4 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR GLOBAL COST*/
/*UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_CG   FLG_CD1
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT 
CSC.ITEM_KEY
,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
,CSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) AS RNK
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_CG   FLG_CD

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) X
ON FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = X.ITEM_KEY
AND X.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
/*AND X.RNK = 1
AND FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = X.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
AND FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME = X.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE  FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_GBL'*/
/*STEP: 5 DEFAULT UNIT COST AS 0 sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of Q1FY15*/
UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,0 AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD1

 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
WI_FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,WI_FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
,WI_FLG_CD.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
FROM
(   
/*STEP: 1 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR MATERIAL TRANSACTIONS FOR 10008*/
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.UNIT_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT
Z.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,Z.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,Z.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_QTY = 1 THEN MTL_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_QTY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_AMT = 1 THEN CAL_COST ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_AMT
,COMP_MTL_AMT/COMP_MTL_QTY AS UNIT_USD_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
ABS(MTL.TRANSACTION_QTY) AS MTL_QTY
,ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_DR_USD_AMT,0)) + ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_CR_USD_AMT,0))  AS CAL_COST
,MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ORDER BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_AMT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ORDER BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_QTY
FROM
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL
ON TRX_DET.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
WHERE MTL.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition'
AND MTL.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
AND TRX_DET.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  = 'Cost of Goods Sold'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO FIX1 
   WHERE MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = FIX1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
   AND MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = FIX1.ITEM_KEY            
   AND MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = FIX1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND FIX1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_10008')
) Z
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY    = FLG_CD1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY                 =     FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     = FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_10008'
UNION ALL
/*STEP: 1 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR MATERIAL TRANSACTIONS FOR 33*/
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.UNIT_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN 
(
SELECT
Z.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,Z.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,Z.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_QTY = 1 THEN MTL_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_QTY
,SUM(CASE WHEN RNK_AMT = 1 THEN CAL_COST ELSE 0 END) AS COMP_MTL_AMT
,COMP_MTL_AMT/COMP_MTL_QTY AS UNIT_USD_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
ABS(MTL.TRANSACTION_QTY) AS MTL_QTY
,ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_DR_USD_AMT,0)) + ABS(COALESCE(TRX_DET.RU_CR_USD_AMT,0))  AS CAL_COST
,MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
,MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY
,MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ORDER BY TRX_DET.MATERIAL_TRNSCTN_DETAIL_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_AMT
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ORDER BY MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY  ASC) AS RNK_QTY
FROM
$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL
ON TRX_DET.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
WHERE MTL.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue'
AND MTL.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
AND TRX_DET.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  = 'Deferred Cost of Goods Sold'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO FIX1 
   WHERE MTL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = FIX1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
   AND MTL.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = FIX1.ITEM_KEY            
   AND MTL.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = FIX1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND FIX1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_33')
) Z
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) X
ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY    = FLG_CD1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY                 =     FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY            
AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY     = FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'MTL_TRX_33'
/*STEP: 2 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR AS BUILT*/
UNION ALL
/*SELECT 
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE  COALESCE(BOM.DF_FEE_USD_COST,0) + COALESCE(BOM.DV_ROLLUP_USD_COST,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_CG   FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM
ON FLG_CD1.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND BOM.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS'
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'AS_BUILT' */
SELECT 
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE  COALESCE(BOM.CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO   FLG_CD1
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON FLG_CD1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE = NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN BOM
ON CAST(TRIM(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)||'-'||TRIM(NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT) AS VARCHAR(50))=BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
AND FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'AS_BUILT'

/*STEP: 3 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR LOCAL ORG*/
UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO   FLG_CD1
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT 
CSC.ITEM_KEY
,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
,CSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) AS RNK
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST CSC
ON CSC.ITEM_KEY  = FLG_CD.ITEM_KEY 
AND CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = FLG_CD.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
AND CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= COALESCE(FLG_CD.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,FLG_CD.AR_TRX_DATETIME ) 
WHERE FLG_CD.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_LCL'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) X
ON FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = X.ITEM_KEY
AND FLG_CD1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE = X.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
/*AND X.RNK = 1*/
AND X.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
AND X.GLOBAL_NAME = FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE  FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_LCL'
/* sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of Q1FY15 STEP: 4 CALCULATE UNIT COST FOR GLOBAL COST*/
/*UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,CASE WHEN FLG_CD1.NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(X.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0) END AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_CG   FLG_CD1
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT 
CSC.ITEM_KEY
,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME
,CSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) AS RNK
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_CG   FLG_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST CSC
ON CSC.ITEM_KEY  = FLG_CD.ITEM_KEY 
AND CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
AND CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= COALESCE(FLG_CD.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,FLG_CD.AR_TRX_DATETIME )
WHERE FLG_CD.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_GBL'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME,CSC.ITEM_KEY,CSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME ORDER BY CSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) X
ON FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY = X.ITEM_KEY
AND X.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
AND X.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
AND X.GLOBAL_NAME = FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
/*AND X.RNK = 
WHERE  FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'STAND_COST_GBL'*/
/*STEP: 5 DEFAULT UNIT COST AS 0 sdande : 6/20/2014 as part of Q1FY15*/
UNION ALL
SELECT
FLG_CD1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
,FLG_CD1.GLOBAL_NAME
,0 AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
,FLG_CD1.ITEM_KEY  
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_TRX_FLG_CD_RAO  FLG_CD1
WHERE FLG_CD1.LINE_FLG_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
)WI_FLG_CD
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH,$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  WHERE WI_FLG_CD.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  AND NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
  AND WI_FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
/*   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_STD_CST_CG WDNRT
WHERE WI_FLG_CD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID =  WDNRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
AND WI_FLG_CD.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRT.GLOBAL_NAME)*/

SELECT 
   TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   GLOBAL_NAME,
   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
   DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
   DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   (
   SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   COALESCE(CAST((
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
     THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE 
              THEN 1.000000
              ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
            END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     ELSE  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
   END)
   * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
   ),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   0     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
   
   CAST(
   COALESCE((
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE  CAST( CAST(( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
                 WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
                  * 
                  CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE  
                    THEN 1 
                    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
                  END 
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
             * 
             CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
           * 
           COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
   END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   
   /*COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
         THEN 
           CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit'
             OR
             (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE='RETURN'))
             THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
       END) 
   END 
   *  
   (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,*/
    0.0000000 AS   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
