    0.0000000 AS  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
    WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
    0.0000000 AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO  WDNRTEQ
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
         WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
         AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
   AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y'AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0) /*ADDED THIS FILTER FOR QUALIFYING TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
   UNION ALL
     SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   COALESCE(CAST((
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
     THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE 
              THEN 1.000000
              ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
            END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     ELSE  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
   END)
   * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
   ),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   0     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
   
   CAST(
   COALESCE((
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE  CAST( CAST(( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
                 WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
                  * 
                  CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE  
                    THEN 1 
                    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
                  END 
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
             * 
             CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
           * 
           COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
   END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   
   /*COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
         THEN 
           CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit'
             OR
             (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE='RETURN'))
             THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
       END) 
   END 
   *  
   (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,*/
    0.0000000 AS   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0.0000000 AS  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
    WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
    0.0000000 AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO  WDNRTEQ
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
         WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
         AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
   AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y'AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0) /*ADDED THIS FILTER FOR QUALIFYING TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
   )DRVD

SELECT  
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME    GLOBAL_NAME,
   CAST
    (
     COALESCE(
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE (SUB_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY)
          *
          (CAST(  CAST( COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100
                   * 
                   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
                  ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
       END , 0.0000000 ) 
   AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
   
     CAST
    (
     COALESCE(
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE (EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY)
          *
          (CAST(  CAST( COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100
                   * 
                   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
                  ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
       END , 0.0000000 ) 
   AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
    FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S SUB_ALL
     ON NCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2  
   AND SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_NAME='Cisco Offer Attribution' /*NRS PI4 change */  
   INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_OA_S EXT_ALL
      ON SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID  
   AND  SUB_ALL.APPLICATION_ID=EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID   /*NRS PI4 change */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
     ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
     AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
     AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
     ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
  WHERE NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y'  
  AND NCR.TSV_FLAG='N'     /*ADDED THIS FILTER TO RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/

SELECT 
   BATCH_ID,
   ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
   ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   ACCOUNT_CLASS,
   ACCOUNT_CODE,
   ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   CAST(ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER AS INTEGER),
   ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
   AMOUNT,
   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
   COGS_PERCENT,
   COMMENTS,
   CONTEXT,
   CREATED_BY,
   CREATION_DATE,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
   DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
   EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
   EXTRACT_TYPE,
   FISCAL_ID,
   FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
   FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
   GES_UPDATE_DATE,
   GLOBAL_NAME,
   GL_DATE,
   GL_POSTED_DATE,
   GROUPING_ID,
   INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
   INVOICE_PERCENT,
   INVOICING_RULE_ID,
   LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
   LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
   SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   LINE_TYPE,
   LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
   ORDER_HEADER_ID,
   ORDER_LINE_ID,
   ORDER_NUMBER,
   ORG_ID,
   LINE_PERCENT,
   PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   QUOTA_FLAG,
   REASON_CODE,
   REBATE_AMOUNT,
   REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
   REQUEST_ID,
   RULE_START_DATE,
   SALESREP_ID,
   SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
   SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   SPLIT_PERCENT,
   TERRITORY_ID,
   TRANSACTION_DATE,
   TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
   TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
   TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   TRX_DATE,
   TRX_NAME,
   TRX_NUMBER,
   TRX_TYPE,
   UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
   UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
   CREATE_DATETIME,
   ACTION_CODE,
  CAST (GL_DATE AS DATE),
  DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
  SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  SK_TRX_ID_INT,
  XAAS_OA_FLAG, /*Added as part of OA-NGCCRM Q1FY16*/
  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT /* added as a part of sales credit changes */
 ,SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
 ,TSV_FLAG
 ,MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RV_P WHERE EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
  AND COALESCE(ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,'AR')  IN ('RAE_REVENUE','RAE_COGS')  AND     GLOBAL_NAME='CG'

SELECT 
 TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 GLOBAL_NAME,
 GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
 GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
 FROM
 (
 SELECT 
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 COALESCE(CAST((
 CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
   THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
            THEN 1.000000
            ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
          END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
   ELSE  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
 END)
 * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
 ),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
 
 CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 0     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
 
 CAST(
 COALESCE((
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
   THEN 0.0000000 
   ELSE CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' 
       THEN CAST( CAST(( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
               THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
               WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
               THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
                * 
                CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
                  THEN 1 
                  ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
                END 
               ELSE 0.0000000
             END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
           * 
           CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
         * 
         COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
       ELSE 0.0000000
     END
 END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,/* OAQ1FY15*/
 
 COALESCE(CAST(
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
   THEN 0.0000000 
   ELSE( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
       THEN /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation 
         CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
         */
         CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit'
           OR
           (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE='RETURN'))
           THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY /* OAQ1FY15*/
           ELSE 0.0000000
         END
       ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
     END) 
 END 
 *  
 ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000) * WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 
0.0000000 AS  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 CASE WHEN  ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
 )
 AND /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' AND  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
   THEN 0 
   ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  
 END   DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
 NOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT AS ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT,
 CAST( ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)* CAST(COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))/(CASE WHEN (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 THEN 1.0000000
 WHEN  DV_EXTENDED_QTY < 0 THEN DV_EXTENDED_QTY * -1  ELSE DV_EXTENDED_QTY END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  as UNIT_PRICE,
 CAST(COALESCE(
 CAST(
 CAST(
 (CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN 
 CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit'
 /* rivijay: commented to use top SKU qty 
 THEN WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY */
 THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
  ELSE 0.0000000
 END
 /* rivijay: commented to use top SKU qty 
 ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY */
 ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
 END) *
 (CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' THEN 0.0000000 
 ELSE CAST(UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
 END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
 *
 ( CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000 
 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
 END )
 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
 CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 /* OA Q1FY15 */
 0     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,ATTRIBUTION_PCT FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
    WHERE NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA
   ON NCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT=NOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT  
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  /*:pvenketa CHANGE FOR Q1FY15 as part of SC-LSS*/
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 /*END OF CHANGES Q1FY15as part of SC-LSS*/
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON NOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
  ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
 /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN
  ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
  
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN_CAL
  ON (SMSOLN_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN_CAL
  ON ( SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */    
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
      ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
      AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
 ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
  ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
  ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
  ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
  AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL  
  ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
  ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)    
 
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
  
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
  ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
  ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO  WDNRTEQ
  ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_BASE_PRC_RAO WDNRTBP
  ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTBP.GLOBAL_NAME )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_STD_CST_RAO WDNRTSC
  ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTSC.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
       WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
 AND (SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)  
 AND (SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL )
 AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
 AND NCR.MERAKI_FLAG='N'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 COALESCE(CAST(
 (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 
  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
     THEN 1.000000
     ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8))
        END) 
  AS DECIMAL(26,7))
  ELSE NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
 END)* COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)  GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
 
 CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 0 REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
 
 CAST(COALESCE((
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
  CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
   CAST
   ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
      CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
      ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) 
      END 
     ELSE 0.0000000
    END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
  ELSE 0.0000000
  END
 END),0.0000000) 
 AS DECIMAL(26,7))   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 
 COALESCE(CAST(
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
   THEN 0.0000000 
   ELSE ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
       THEN CASE  /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation  
           WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit'
           */          
           WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit' 
             OR 
            (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
           THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY /*OAQ1FY15 */
           ELSE 0.0000000
         END
       ELSE  WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
      END) 
 END 
 * ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000) * WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 
0.0000000 AS  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 CASE WHEN  ((EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')) )
 AND  /* NACAR.SAF_TYPE_CD = 'CREDIT_REBILL' */ UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'  AND  NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
  THEN 0 
  ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  
 END    DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
 0 ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT,
 0 UNIT_PRICE,
 0 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
 0 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,ATTRIBUTION_PCT FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
   WHERE NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
   GROUP BY 1,2,3) NOA
 ON NCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT=NOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT    
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  /*:pvenketa CHANGE FOR Q1FY15 as part of SC-LSS*/
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 /*END OF CHANGES Q1FY15as part of SC-LSS*/
 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
  ON NOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
  ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
  AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL 
 ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
      ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
      AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
	  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
 ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
  ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
  ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
 /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
  ON (NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOL.SS_CODE) 
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
  ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
  AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL   
  ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
  ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
  ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
  ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO WDNRTEQ
  ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_BASE_PRC_RAO WDNRTBP
  ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTBP.GLOBAL_NAME )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_STD_CST_RAO WDNRTSC
  ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTSC.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
   WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
   AND NCR.MERAKI_FLAG='N'
  ) DRVD

SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN 'Provision Adjustment' 
  WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ='DA'  THEN 'Deferral-Release' ELSE 'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  /*NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,*/
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  COALESCE(SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY) SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
  CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
       ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
       END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
  /*EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
   /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
   /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
 /*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME           in ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS') THEN EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ELSE NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
   NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
  /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
   CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME in ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/)
 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%') ) /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') )/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
  ))  THEN -7777 
   ELSE  COALESCE(SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SMSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
  
  SAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
  CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME in ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
  /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
  OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') )/*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
)) THEN
       NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN -9984
   WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'DA' THEN -9982
   ELSE -9980
  END DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  COALESCE(NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,NSOL_CAL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')
   THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
  COALESCE(NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,NSOL_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  COALESCE(NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,NSO_CAL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE) DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  COALESCE(NSOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,NSOL_CAL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE) SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  COALESCE(NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,NSO_CAL.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE) DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
  NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
  COALESCE(NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  COALESCE(NSOL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,NSOL_CAL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  COALESCE(CAST(NSS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DT AS DATE) , CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)) SHIPPED_DT,
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
  SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
   /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
   
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
  /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE ) 
  /* Commented as part of sales credit implementation*/
   /*INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
   ON( EST.TERRITORY_ID  = NCR.TERRITORY_ID                  
   AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME  =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
   */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  
  /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO
   ON (SMSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID               
   AND SMSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON (SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  /* INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL */
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL
   ON (SMSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
   AND SMSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  
  /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO_CAL
   ON (SMSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID               
   AND SMSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
   ON (SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL
   ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL_CAL
   ON (SMSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
   AND SMSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD)
  /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_SHIPMENTS NSS 
   ON (COALESCE(SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SMSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) = NSS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )  
   
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL 
   ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )
   /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL_CAL
   ON (SMSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
  /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
   
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
   ON (COALESCE(NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,NSOL_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)= NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
    ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
   AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
  
    /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
  ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON  NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
 /* LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON ( CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 
               THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               END =MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
  ON         (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
  ON         STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
  ON         EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))*//*added as a part of Q3FY14 Release*/
  /*AND       EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   */
  /*prbobba : added for Q1FY15*/
     
   /* START : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Oct 2022 Rel */  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD,RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE where ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('CBM-OPL-ICMS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') group by 1,2,3)NATL_CBM 
  ON NATL_CBM.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_OPL
  ON (NATL_CBM.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY = NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_OPL
  ON (NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  AND NSO_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_OPL
  ON (NSOT_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO_CBM
    ON (NSOL_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE= NCIO_CBM.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE)
  /* END : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Oct 2022  Rel */ 
  
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND ( SMSO.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSO_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR NSO_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)
  AND (  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY   IS NOT NULL OR NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IS NOT NULL  )
  AND (  NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL OR NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL OR  NSOT_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL )
  AND (  SMSOL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR  SMSOL_CAL.SS_CODE   IS NOT NULL  OR NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE  IS NOT NULL)
  AND (  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR  NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL ) 
  AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/  
  AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='N' OR (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0)) /*ADDED TO RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
    
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN 'Provision Adjustment'
  WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ='DA'  THEN 'Deferral-Release' ELSE 'As Invoiced' END  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  /*NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,*/
  NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  COALESCE(SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY) SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  /*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
  CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
       ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
       END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  /*EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
  
   /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
   /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
  /*CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME           in ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS') THEN EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ELSE NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,*/
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
  
  -7777 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  SAT.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
   CASE WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME   IN ('WEBEX', 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) 
   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
   /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS') )   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ 
   OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') ) /*Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
    )) THEN
       NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='PA' THEN -9984
   WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'DA' THEN -9982
   ELSE -9980  
  END DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) as SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')
   THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
  -7777 MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , /* NEED TO CORRECT 3NF TABLE*/
  COALESCE(NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE ,NSO_CAL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE) DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) as SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
  COALESCE(NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE ,NSO_CAL.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE) DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
  -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
  COALESCE(NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT,
  CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
  SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
  /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
  /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE ) 
  /* Commented as part of sales credit implemetation*/
  /*INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
   ON( EST.TERRITORY_ID  = NCR.TERRITORY_ID                  
   AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME  =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
  */ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
   
  /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO
   ON (SMSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER               
   AND SMSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON (SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO_CAL
   ON (SMSO_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER               
   AND SMSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
   ON (SMSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL
   ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */     
   
  /*INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL
   ON (SMSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
   AND SMSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_SHIPMENTS NSS 
   ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )  
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
   ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
   ON (NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE= NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE)*/
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
    ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
   AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
  ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
  
    /* prbobba : Added for Q1FY15 */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
  ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  
 /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15 */ /*PRMADDAL: COMMENTED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS */
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON  NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON ( CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0 
               THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               END =MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
  /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
  
  /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
  ON         (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
  ON         STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
  ON         EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES')) *//*added as a part of Q3FY14 Release*/
  /*AND       EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   */
  /*prbobba : added for Q1FY15*/
    
  /* START : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM OCT 2022 Rel */  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD,RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE where ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('CBM-OPL-ICMS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') group by 1,2,3)NATL_CBM 
  ON NATL_CBM.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_OPL
  ON (NATL_CBM.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY = NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND NSOL_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_OPL
  ON (NSOL_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  AND NSO_OPL.SS_CODE='OPL') 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_OPL
  ON (NSOT_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO_CBM
    ON (NSOL_OPL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE= NCIO_CBM.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE)
  /* END : JOINS ADDED AS PART OF CBM Oct 2022 Rel */  
  
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND  ( SMSO.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSO_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR NSO_OPL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL )
  AND  (  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL OR  NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY   IS NOT NULL OR NSO_OPL.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IS NOT NULL )
  AND  (  NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL OR NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME    IS NOT NULL OR  NSOT_OPL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL )
  AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/   
  AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='N' OR (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0)) /*ADDED TO RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/

SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 'LINE' AS LINE_TYPE_CD,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
 NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
 -7777 AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
 NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 -7777 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 -999 AS POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  ,
 SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, 
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
 NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER  SALES_REP_NUM,
 CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN  
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')  THEN 'ADJ' 
  ELSE CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END 
  END               
 WHEN  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'INV' THEN 'INV'
 ELSE  'ADJ' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME AS INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME
  FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT
  ON ( EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME  = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
  ON( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
  AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT = EORCT.ORG_ID )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
    ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)  
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SORR      
  ON  (SORR.RULE_ID =NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
  AND SORR.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )  
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
  ON ( EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
  AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
   ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
  AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
   ON (NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY) 
 WHERE NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' 
 AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='N' OR (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID>0)) /*ADDED THIS TO RESTRICT TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
 UNION ALL /*TSV ACCRUALS CHANGES*/
 SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 'LINE' AS LINE_TYPE_CD,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
 NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
 -7777 AS RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
 NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 -7777 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 -999 AS POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  ,
 -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, 
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
 NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER  SALES_REP_NUM,
 CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN  
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')  THEN 'ADJ' 
  ELSE CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END 
  END               
 WHEN  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'INV' THEN 'INV'
 ELSE  'ADJ' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(20)) AS INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME
  FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
/*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT
  ON ( EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME  = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE SABS
  ON( SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT = EORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
  AND SABS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  AND SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT = EORCT.ORG_ID )  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  */
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
    ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)  
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SORR      
  ON  (SORR.RULE_ID =NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
  AND SORR.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )  
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA
  ON ( EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
  AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
   ON(SRASC.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER
  AND SRASC.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
   ON (NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY) 
 WHERE NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' 
 AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y' AND NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID<0)

SELECT  
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME    GLOBAL_NAME,
   CAST
    (
     COALESCE(
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE (NART.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY)
          *
          (CAST(  CAST( COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100
                   * 
                   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
                  ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
       END , 0.0000000 ) 
   AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
   
     CAST
    (
     COALESCE(
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE (NART.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY)
          *
          (CAST(  CAST( COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100
                   * 
                   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
                  ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) )
       END , 0.0000000 ) 
   AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
    FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_NET_REVENUE SRNR
     on SRNR.NET_REVENUE_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RAO_XXCFI_RAE_NET_REVENUE EOXRNR
     ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SK_NET_REVENUE_ID
     AND EOXRNR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
     AND EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRNR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  
   INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_LINE_REF_NUM,OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT,ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  
   WHERE ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' GROUP BY 1,2,3)NART
   ON EOXRNR.TSV_LINE_REF_NUM=NART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM
   AND CAST(EOXRNR.LINE_ID AS INTEGER)=NART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SAT
   ON (NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
     ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
  WHERE NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' 
  AND NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y'

SELECT 
   TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   GLOBAL_NAME,
   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
   DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
   DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
   DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   (
   SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   COALESCE(CAST((
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
     THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE 
              THEN 1.000000
              ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
            END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     ELSE  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
   END)
   * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
   ),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   0     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
   
   CAST(
   COALESCE((
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE  CAST( CAST(( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
                 WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
                  * 
                  CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE  
                    THEN 1 
                    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
                  END 
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
             * 
             CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
           * 
           COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
   END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   
   /*COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
         THEN 
           CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit'
             OR
             (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE='RETURN'))
             THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
       END) 
   END 
   *  
   (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,*/
    0.0000000 AS   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0.0000000 AS  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
    WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
    0.0000000 AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO  WDNRTEQ
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
         WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
         AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
   AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y'AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0) /*ADDED THIS FILTER FOR QUALIFYING TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
   UNION ALL
     SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   COALESCE(CAST((
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
     THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * ( CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE 
              THEN 1.000000
              ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
            END) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     ELSE  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
   END)
   * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)
   ),0.0000000) GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
   
   CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   0     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
   
   CAST(
   COALESCE((
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE  CAST( CAST(( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
                 WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
                 THEN CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
                  * 
                  CASE WHEN NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE  
                    THEN 1 
                    ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
                  END 
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
             * 
             CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
           * 
           COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
   END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   
   /*COALESCE(CAST(
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
     THEN 0.0000000 
     ELSE( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' 
         THEN 
           CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'RMA with Credit'
             OR
             (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE='RETURN'))
             THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
       END) 
   END 
   *  
   (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,*/
    0.0000000 AS   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0.0000000 AS  DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
    WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
    0.0000000 AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    0     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_EXT_QTY_RAO  WDNRTEQ
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
         WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
         AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/ 
   AND (NCR.TSV_FLAG='Y'AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY<0) /*ADDED THIS FILTER FOR QUALIFYING TSV TRANSACTIONS*/
   )DRVD

SELECT
  FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,              
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT   ,  
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD     ,                 
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_REVENUE' THEN AMT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ELSE 0 END, 
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_REVENUE'  THEN AMT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ELSE 0 END,
  AMT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,   
  KEY1.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD     ,         
  KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  ,          
  KEY2.LINE_TYPE_CD  ,                
  NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT SPLIT_PCT  ,                   
  CAST(NCR.GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_DTM   ,                     
  CAST(NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_POSTED_DTM   ,              
  CAST(NCR.RULE_START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RULE_START_DTM  ,              
  CASE WHEN NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG = 'F' THEN 'FORWARD' ELSE 'REVERSE' END FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
  NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG LAST_RECORD_FLG,         
  KEY1.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD    ,    
  KEY1.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD    , 
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   , 
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
  'FOR REVENUE REPORTING'  REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE     ,       
  KEY2.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_KEY    ,           
  KEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
  KEY1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
  KEY1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,         
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,        
  KEY2.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
  KEY1.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
  KEY1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  KEY1.PRODUCT_KEY   ,                
  KEY2.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD   ,      
  FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG    ,     
  (CASE WHEN SOURCE_DATA_KEY5 IN  ('NRS SSPTP Transition Release','NRS_MPOB_TRANS') THEN 'N'
  WHEN (
     FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' 
     /* AND FLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG = 'N'  */ /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */ 
     /* AND FLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'N'  */ /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */ 
     /* AND FLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y'   */ /*satchinn: Commented as part   corp revenue flag changes  */
     /*AND FLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG = 'N'*/ /*pdubasi: commented the condition DV_CHARGES_FLG='N' as part of Q4FY14 LSS Release*/ 
     AND FLAG.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP = 'Y'
     )
    THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N' 
   END
  ) DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG,
  /* FLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG    ,    rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */ 
  '=' AS DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG ,
  FLAG.DV_MISC_FLG   ,                
  /* FLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG     , rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */ 
  '='     DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,
  FLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    ,         
  FLAG.DV_SERVICE_FLG  ,              
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_REVENUE'  THEN AMT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0 END  ,   
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_REVENUE'  THEN 
  CASE WHEN KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='Provision Adjustment' THEN 0 ELSE AMT.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  END 
  ELSE 0 END ,
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_COGS'  THEN AMT.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END  ,         
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_REVENUE'  THEN 
  CASE WHEN KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='Provision Adjustment' THEN 0 ELSE AMT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY END
  ELSE 0 END  ,            
  KEY1.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY     ,
  FLAG.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG   ,       
  KEY1.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM    ,      
  KEY1.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
  KEY1.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
  KEY1.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT,                  
  KEY2.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,       
  KEY2.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  CASE WHEN NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'RAE_REVENUE'  THEN 
  CASE WHEN KEY1.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD='Provision Adjustment' THEN 0 ELSE AMT.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT END ELSE 0 END ,
  KEY2.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME   ,     
  KEY2.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,     
  FLAG.MAJOR_LINE_FLG   ,             
  KEY1.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
  KEY1.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
  KEY1.SERVICE_TYPE_CD    ,           
  KEY1.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
  AMT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT  ,      
  KEY2.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT   ,  
  KEY1.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD   ,    
  KEY1.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
  KEY2.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,       
  KEY2.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    ,       
  KEY1.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,      
  KEY2.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD      ,      
  KEY1.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
  KEY2.SALES_REP_NUM     ,            
  CASE WHEN NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE = 'O' THEN  NCR.GL_DT  ELSE CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)  END DV_FISCAL_DT  ,
  NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE  ,
  KEY1.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
  NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL THEN -995
     ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
   END  as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  COALESCE(SORR.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  NCR.AMOUNT                ,        
  NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 NCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT, /*Added as part of OA Q1FY16*/ 
 NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG, /*Added as part of OA Q1FY16*/
 NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT /* added as a part of sales credit changes */ 
,NCR.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
,NCR.TSV_FLAG
,NCR.MERAKI_FLAG
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_KEY1_RAO KEY1
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY1.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_KEY2_RAO KEY2
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = KEY2.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = KEY2.GLOBAL_NAME)  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_FLAG_RAO FLAG
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = FLAG.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = FLAG.GLOBAL_NAME) 
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_RAE_AMOUNT_RAO AMT
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = AMT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AMT.GLOBAL_NAME)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
    ON ( NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SORR
  ON NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT
 RT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
 ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 ,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)IS NULL THEN 
  CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN -9999
   WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN -8888
   ELSE -7777
  END 
 ELSE COALESCE(SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NULL THEN
   CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= 'QTC' THEN -9999
   WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN -8888
   ELSE -7777
   END
 ELSE COALESCE(SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 END AS RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-997) AS ITEM_KEY
 ,COALESCE(SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
 ,COALESCE(ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE,'UNK') AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE   
 ,COALESCE(SLS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,SLS_CAL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM)
 ,COALESCE(ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
 ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME 
 ,COALESCE(ESOT.NAME,ESOT_CAL.NAME,'UNK') AS NAME
 ,COALESCE(SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM,SLS_V1_CAL.DISPATCH_DTM)
 ,ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT 
 ,COALESCE(SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,SLS_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE )
 ,X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY AS MTL_INV_ORG_KEY
 ,X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY AS MTL_ITEM_KEY
 ,X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS MTL_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY
 ,X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE
 ,X.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 ,X.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
 ,BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY
 ,ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG
 ,ORG.CG1_FLG 
 /* Commented as part of Q1FY15*/
 /*, CASE WHEN NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
 ELSE 
  /*CASE WHEN ORG.CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM AS DATE), ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  + INTERVAL '1' DAY)  <  ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  THEN 'STAND_COST_GBL'
   ELSE
   CASE WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN 
    CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' THEN 
     CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
      CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
     ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
     END
    ELSE 
     CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' 
        ELSE CASE WHEN ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'STAND_COST_LCL' 
                           ELSE  CASE WHEN BOM_OLD.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT  > '2013-11-17'  THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'  END 
                   END
     END
    END
   /*END
  ELSE 'STAND_COST_GBL'
  END 
  ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
  END
 END 
 AS LINE_FLG_CD*//* Commented  ends as part of Q1FY15*/
 /* sdande : 6/20/2014 New code implemented as part of Q1FY15*/
 ,CASE WHEN (NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV'))  THEN 'UNKNOWN'   
 else 
 CASE WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN                            
  CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' THEN 
 CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
 CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
 ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
 END
 ELSE 
 CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' END
 END
 ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
 END 
 end
 AS LINE_FLG_CD /* sdande : 6/20/2014 Changes end as part of Q1FY15*/ 
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO RT
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON RT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON RT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE*/ /*COMMENTED THIS JOIN TO PREVENT DEFAULT RECORD BLOATING*/
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
 ON  RT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON SAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT   = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID
 AND NSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT 
 ON ESOT.NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS
 ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS.SS_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1
 ON SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SLS_V1.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
 ON NSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT   = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID
 AND NSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT_CAL 
 ON ESOT_CAL.NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 AND ESOT_CAL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_GNAME.ORIG_GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS_CAL
 ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS_CAL.SS_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1_CAL
 ON SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SLS_V1_CAL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */  
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG
 ON COALESCE(SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) = ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM_LNK
 ON  COALESCE(SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) = BOM_LNK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND COALESCE(SLS.PRODUCT_KEY ,SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY)= BOM_LNK.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
 AND BOM_LNK.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS'  
 /*COGs Q2FY13 Release Changes */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN  BOM
 ON CAST(TRIM(COALESCE(SLS.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,SLS_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT))||'-'||TRIM(COALESCE(SLS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,SLS_CAL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT)) AS VARCHAR(50))=BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
 AND COALESCE(SLS.PRODUCT_KEY ,SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY)= BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
 AND ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  (
    SELECT  MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY, MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO RT1
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
    ON RT1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME
