    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
    ON(NP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
       
    /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1 */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1
    ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS1.SS_CODE   
    /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
   ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT1.ORG_ID
   AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1_CAL
    ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE
   /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */  
    
    /*INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V11
    ON SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V11.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND SLS_V11.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'*/
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG1
    ON COALESCE(SLS1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SLS1_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) = ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL1
    ON MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
    AND MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = NP1.ITEM_KEY            
    AND MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = COALESCE(SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
    INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE MTL_TYPE1
    ON MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
    AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
    INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET1
    ON TRX_DET1.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL1.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
    WHERE  1=1 
    AND 
    ( (MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition'
     AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
     AND TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Cost of Goods Sold'
     )
     OR
     ( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue'
     AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
     AND TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Deferred Cost of Goods Sold'
     )
    )
    /*AND ORG1.CG1_FLG = 'Y'
    AND COALESCE(CAST(SLS_V11.DISPATCH_DTM AS DATE), ORG1.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  + INTERVAL '1' DAY)  >=  ORG1.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT
    */
    AND COALESCE(SLS1.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,SLS1_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE) = 'STANDARD'
    AND (SLS1.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE  IS NOT NULL  ) 
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY, MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC) = 1
  ) X
 ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
 AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = NP.ITEM_KEY            
 AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = COALESCE(SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND RT.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND  RT.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/   
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 RT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
 ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 ,NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NULL THEN 
  CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'QTC' THEN -9999
   WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN -8888
   ELSE -7777
  END 
 ELSE COALESCE(SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 END AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NULL THEN
   CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= 'QTC' THEN -9999
   WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'BV' THEN -8888
   ELSE -7777
   END
 ELSE COALESCE(SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 END AS RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-997) AS ITEM_KEY
 ,COALESCE(SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
 ,COALESCE(ORG.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE,'UNK') AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE   
 ,COALESCE(SLS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,SLS_CAL.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM)
 ,COALESCE(ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
 ,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME 
 ,COALESCE(ESOT.NAME,ESOT_CAL.NAME,'UNK') AS NAME
 ,COALESCE(SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM,SLS_V1_CAL.DISPATCH_DTM)
 ,ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT 
 ,COALESCE(SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,SLS_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE )
 ,X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY AS MTL_INV_ORG_KEY
 ,X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY AS MTL_ITEM_KEY
 ,X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS MTL_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY
 ,X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD  AS ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CODE
 ,X.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 ,X.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
 ,BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY
 ,ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG
 ,ORG.CG1_FLG 
 /* Commented as part of Q1FY15*/
 /*, CASE WHEN NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
 ELSE 
  /*CASE WHEN ORG.CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(SLS_V1.DISPATCH_DTM AS DATE), ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  + INTERVAL '1' DAY)  <  ORG.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  THEN 'STAND_COST_GBL'
   ELSE
   CASE WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN 
    CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' THEN 
     CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
      CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
     ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
     END
    ELSE 
     CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' 
        ELSE CASE WHEN ORG.RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'STAND_COST_LCL' 
                           ELSE  CASE WHEN BOM_OLD.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT  > '2013-11-17'  THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'  END 
                   END
     END
    END
   /*END
  ELSE 'STAND_COST_GBL'
  END 
  ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
  END
 END 
 AS LINE_FLG_CD*//* Commented  ends as part of Q1FY15*/
 /* sdande : 6/20/2014 New code implemented as part of Q1FY15*/
 ,CASE WHEN (NP.ITEM_KEY IS NULL OR SLS_V1.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD in ('ELECTRONIC','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIVERY','000001_DEF_L_E-DELIV'))  THEN 'UNKNOWN'   
 else 
 CASE WHEN ORG.EP_AB_BOM_COGS_CALC_ENBLD_FLG= 'Y' THEN                            
  CASE WHEN SLS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE = 'STANDARD' THEN 
 CASE WHEN X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN
 CASE WHEN X.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='COST OF GOODS SOLD' THEN 'MTL_TRX_10008' ELSE 'MTL_TRX_33' END
 ELSE 'STAND_COST_LCL'
 END
 ELSE 
 CASE WHEN BOM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'AS_BUILT' ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' END
 END
 ELSE  'STAND_COST_LCL' 
 END 
 end
 AS LINE_FLG_CD /* sdande : 6/20/2014 Changes end as part of Q1FY15*/ 
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO RT
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON RT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON RT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE*/ /*COMMENTED THIS JOIN TO PREVENT DEFAULT RECORD BLOATING*/
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
 ON  RT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON SAT.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT   = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID
 AND NSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT 
 ON ESOT.NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS
 ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS.SS_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1
 ON SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SLS_V1.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
 ON NSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT   = RT.ORDER_HEADER_ID
 AND NSO_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT_CAL 
 ON ESOT_CAL.NAME = NSO_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
 AND ESOT_CAL.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_GNAME.ORIG_GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS_CAL
 ON RT.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS_CAL.SS_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V1_CAL
 ON SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SLS_V1_CAL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */  
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG
 ON COALESCE(SLS.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,SLS_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)= ORG.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK BOM_LNK
 ON  COALESCE(SLS.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY) = BOM_LNK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND COALESCE(SLS.PRODUCT_KEY,SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY) = BOM_LNK.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
 AND BOM_LNK.PROCESS_STATUS_CD = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS' 
 /*COGs Q2FY13 Release Changes */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN  BOM
 ON CAST(TRIM(COALESCE(SLS.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,SLS_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT))||'-'||TRIM(COALESCE(SLS.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,SLS_CAL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT)) AS VARCHAR(50))=BOM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
 AND COALESCE(SLS.PRODUCT_KEY,SLS_CAL.PRODUCT_KEY) = BOM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
 AND ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = BOM.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  (
     SELECT  MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY, MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO RT1
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
     ON RT1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
     ON(NP1.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = RT1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
            
    /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1 */
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1 
     ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
     AND NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SLS1.SS_CODE    
     /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
    ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = RT1.ORG_ID
    AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
     /* nnainala INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1_CAL */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SLS1_CAL
     ON RT1.ORDER_LINE_ID = SLS1_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
     AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE
    /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */      
         
     /*INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SLS_V11
     ON SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SLS_V11.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     AND SLS_V11.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG ORG1
     ON COALESCE(SLS1.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,SLS1_CAL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) = ORG1.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
     INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MTL1
     ON MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
     AND MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = NP1.ITEM_KEY            
     AND MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = COALESCE(SLS1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS1_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
     INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_TYPE MTL_TYPE1
     ON MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
     AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = MTL1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME
     INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_DETAIL TRX_DET1
     ON TRX_DET1.BK_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY = MTL1.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY
     WHERE  1=1 
     AND 
     ( (MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'COGS Recognition'
      AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
      AND TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Cost of Goods Sold'
      )
      OR
      ( MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order issue'
      AND MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME = 'Sales order'
      AND TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ='Deferred Cost of Goods Sold'
      )
     )
     /*AND ORG1.CG1_FLG = 'Y'
     AND COALESCE(CAST(SLS_V11.DISPATCH_DTM AS DATE), ORG1.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT  + INTERVAL '1' DAY)  >=  ORG1.RU_DV_INV_ORG_MIGRATION_DT
     */
     AND COALESCE(SLS1.ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,SLS1_CAL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE)= 'STANDARD'
     AND (SLS1.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SLS1_CAL.SS_CODE  IS NOT NULL  )
     QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MTL1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY, MTL1.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY, MTL1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ORDER BY MTL_TYPE1.BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME,MTL_TYPE1.BK_SOURCE_TYPE_NAME,TRX_DET1.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC) = 1
  ) X
 ON X.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY = ORG.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
 AND X.RU_PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY      = NP.ITEM_KEY            
 AND X.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = COALESCE(SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SLS_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE RT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND RT.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
 AND  RT.XAAS_OA_FLAG<>'Y' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/

/*rchettr : No change if Alt_Name is obsolete*/
    SELECT 
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE((( CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'Trade-In Return' AND UPPER(COALESCE(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'MIXED'
           THEN 0 
           ELSE COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) END)),0) <> 0 
    THEN CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') 
        THEN COALESCE( CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE) 
              THEN 0.0000000
              ELSE CAST(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
            END,0.0000000) 
        ELSE 0.0000000
      END
    ELSE 0.0000000
  END AS DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
   ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
       LEFT OUTER  JOIN  /*OAQ1FY15*/
   (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , 
   NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
  NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE, NATIL.SS_CODE               
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
   ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
    ON  NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DNATIL.SS_CODE           
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
          ON(NP.ITEM_KEY                       = CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE DNATIL.PRODUCT_KEY END)
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT
   ON(NPPT.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   AND CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT.END_TV_DATE
   AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List')
  INNER JOIN (
      SELECT 
        NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
        NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
        NP1.ITEM_KEY ITEM_KEY,
        MAX(NPPT1.START_TV_DATE) MAX_START_DATE
        FROM
        $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR1
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME)
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT1 
      ON( SAT1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR1.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
      AND SAT1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
      ON( NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT1.AR_TRX_KEY)
           LEFT OUTER  JOIN  /*OAQ1FY15*/
   (SELECT NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , 
   NATIL_PAR.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS P_SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
  NATIL_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY AS PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY, NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG, NATIL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE, NATIL.SS_CODE         
   FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_PAR  
   ON COALESCE(NATIL.RU_PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,0)  = NATIL_PAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ) DNATIL 
    ON  NCR1.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = DNATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
     AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DNATIL.SS_CODE                  
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
       ON(NP1.ITEM_KEY = CASE WHEN DNATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN DNATIL.PARENT_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE DNATIL.PRODUCT_KEY END)
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT1
      ON(NPPT1.ITEM_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY
      AND NPPT1.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
      AND CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT1.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT1.END_TV_DATE
        )
      GROUP BY
        NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
        NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME,
        NP1.ITEM_KEY
  ) MAX_DATE
  ON(MAX_DATE.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
   AND MAX_DATE.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND MAX_DATE.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   AND MAX_DATE.MAX_START_DATE = NPPT.START_TV_DATE)
   
  /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
   ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
   AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
   ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
   ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
   ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  
  /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN_CAL
   ON (SMSOLN_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
   AND SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN_CAL
   ON ( SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
   ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
   AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL   
   ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
   ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
   
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND  (SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)
  AND (NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL OR NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)
  AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
  AND 1=2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  0 USD_BASE_PRICE 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='N' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
	AND 1=2
/*Added the below Code as part of Q3FY16:OA to enable OA OM data*/
 UNION ALL
  SELECT 
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE((( CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,NSOT_CAL.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME) = 'Trade-In Return' AND UPPER(COALESCE(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'MIXED'
           THEN 0 
           ELSE COALESCE(NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,NSOLN_CAL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) END)),0) <> 0 
    THEN CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') 
        THEN COALESCE( CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE) 
              THEN 0.0000000
              ELSE CAST(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
            END,0.0000000) 
        ELSE 0.0000000
      END
    ELSE 0.0000000
  END AS DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
   ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
    WHERE NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
 GROUP BY 1,2) NOA
    ON NCR.SK_TRX_ID_INT=NOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   LEFT JOIN (SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
    WHERE NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N' GROUP BY 1,2) NOA_PAR
   ON NOA_PAR.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY=NOA_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY                
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT
   ON(NPPT.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   AND CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT.END_TV_DATE
   AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List')
  INNER JOIN (
      SELECT 
        NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
        NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
        NP1.ITEM_KEY ITEM_KEY,
        MAX(NPPT1.START_TV_DATE) MAX_START_DATE
        FROM
        $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR1
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME)
        INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT1 
      ON( SAT1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR1.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
      AND SAT1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
      ON( NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT1.AR_TRX_KEY)  
   INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
    WHERE NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
    GROUP BY 1,2) NOA1
      ON NCR1.SK_TRX_ID_INT=NOA1.SK_TRX_ID_INT
      LEFT JOIN (SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE  WHERE NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N'
   GROUP BY 1,2) NOA_PAR1
     ON NOA_PAR1.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA1.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
       ON NP1.ITEM_KEY =NOA_PAR1.PRODUCT_KEY
        INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT1
      ON(NPPT1.ITEM_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY
      AND NPPT1.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
      AND CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT1.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT1.END_TV_DATE
        )
      GROUP BY
        NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
        NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME,
        NP1.ITEM_KEY
  ) MAX_DATE
  ON(MAX_DATE.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
   AND MAX_DATE.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND MAX_DATE.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   AND MAX_DATE.MAX_START_DATE = NPPT.START_TV_DATE)
   
  /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
   ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
   AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
  /* INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
   ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
   ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
   ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  
  /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = NCR.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'       
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN_CAL
   ON (SMSOLN_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
   AND SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN_CAL
   ON ( SMSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_CAL    
   ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
   AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = SSO_CAL.SS_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV_CAL   
   ON (SSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT_CAL   
   ON (NSOT_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV_CAL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */   
   
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
  AND  (SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL OR SMSOLN_CAL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)
  AND (NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL OR NSOLN_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)
  AND  NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
  AND 1=2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  0 USD_BASE_PRICE 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND NCR.XAAS_OA_FLAG='O' /*Added as part of NGCCRM-XAAS-OA Q1FY16 to restrict the XAAS-OA data*/
	AND 1=2

SELECT
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE_CD  ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
 NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
 SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
 NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
 -7777 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 -999 AS POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  ,
 SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
 NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
 /*ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM, */
 /*modified by prbobba for Q1FY15*/
 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
  /*CASE WHEN EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT  IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS') THEN 'UNKNOWN'
 ELSE NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER END SALES_REP_NUM,*/
 NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN  
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')  THEN 'ADJ' 
  ELSE CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END 
  END               
 WHEN  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'INV' THEN 'INV'
 ELSE  'ADJ' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
 EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,

CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN

  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SATL.SS_CODE)

 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SORR

 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA

 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,

 SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,

 -7777 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,

 SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,

CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN  
  CASE WHEN NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('PA','DA')  THEN 'ADJ' 
  ELSE CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END 
  END               
 WHEN  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'INV' THEN 'INV'
 ELSE  'ADJ' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,

 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RAE_RAO NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
    ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)

  ON EOXRNR.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID

  AND EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME  = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)

  AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME  =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
